title: Xtra Snappy Canadian Pinto Beans Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Canadian stir fry dish featuring pinto beans, with a focus on umami flavor and snappy texture, all while being keto-friendly.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the diced bacon and cook until crispy, then remove from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the cooked pinto beans, soy sauce, and crispy bacon back to the skillet, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the beans are coated in the sauce and the mixture is heated through.
Stir in the chopped green onions and serve hot.
